# MavMeta Project

MavMeta is a Node localhost application with:
- Node + Fastify backend (`src/server`)
- Svelte 5 + Vite frontend (`src/mainview`)
- shared DTO contracts (`src/shared`)

## Runtime Rules

- Use Node/npm workflows only.
- Backend endpoints are HTTP under `/api/*`.
- Frontend calls backend via `src/mainview/backend/backend-client.ts`.
- Salesforce libraries (`@salesforce/core`, SDR) belong in backend modules only.
